records.question: Which documents with receipt number 114 and other details exactly j were sent by Fedex where the shipping agent description is k, the status is currently working on, and the receipt date is on or before 2005-09-30 00:10:02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE documents.receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND documents.other_details = 'j' AND documents.receipt_number = '114' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_shipping_agents on documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code join ref_document_status on documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code where documents.receipt_number = '114' and documents.other_details = 'j' and lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name) = 'fedex' and lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description) like '%k%' and lower(ref_document_status.document_status_description) like '%currently working on%' and documents.receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter documents by receipt number, exact other details, shipping agent name and description, document status description, and receipt date with appropriate joins to related tables.

records.question: Which documents have a type exactly u, receipt number exactly 55, other details exactly p, and a receipt date on or before 1983-09-26 09:32:56?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'u' AND documents.receipt_number = '55' AND documents.receipt_date <= '1983-09-26 09:32:56' AND documents.other_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents where document_type_code = 'u' and receipt_number = '55' and other_details = 'p' and receipt_date <= '1983-09-26 09:32:56' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter documents by exact matches on document_type_code, receipt_number, other_details, and receipt_date on or before the specified date.

records.question: Which documents have other_details exactly as x and are currently working on?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE documents.other_details = 'x' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_document_status on documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code where documents.other_details = 'x' and lower(ref_document_status.document_status_description) like '%currently working on%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find documents with other_details exactly 'x' and that are currently working on, I will filter documents by other_details = 'x' and join with Ref_Document_Status to find the status indicating 'currently working on'.

records.question: Which documents have a type description of b, are handled by UPS with a shipping agent description of g, include other details exactly as z, and have draft details exactly as k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'b' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS' AND documents.other_details = 'z' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'k'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_document_types on documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code join ref_shipping_agents on documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code join document_drafts on documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id where lower(ref_document_types.document_type_description) like '%b%' and lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name) like '%ups%' and lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description) like '%g%' and documents.other_details = 'z' and document_drafts.draft_details = 'k' limit 5
records.thought: Filter documents by joining with document types, shipping agents, and document drafts to match the given criteria on type description, shipping agent description, other details, and draft details.

records.question: Which documents were mailed using the shipping agent USPS?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN documents_mailed ON documents.document_id = documents_mailed.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_shipping_agents on documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code join documents_mailed on documents.document_id = documents_mailed.document_id where lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name) like '%usps%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find documents mailed using the shipping agent USPS, join Documents with Ref_Shipping_Agents on shipping_agent_code and filter by shipping_agent_name 'usps'. Also ensure the document was mailed by joining with Documents_Mailed.

records.question: Which documents received on or after 1983-09-26 09:32:56 have a receipt number exactly 55 and other details exactly p?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.receipt_date >= '1983-09-26 09:32:56' AND documents.receipt_number = '55' AND documents.other_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents where receipt_date >= '1983-09-26 09:32:56' and receipt_number = '55' and lower(other_details) = 'p' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter documents by receipt_date on or after the given datetime, receipt_number exactly 55, and other_details exactly 'p'.

records.question: Which documents were handled by the shipping agent USPS and have associated drafts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_shipping_agents on documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code join document_drafts on documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id where lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name) like '%usps%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find documents handled by the shipping agent USPS that have associated drafts, join Documents with Ref_Shipping_Agents to filter by shipping_agent_name 'usps' and join with Document_Drafts to ensure drafts exist.

records.question: Which documents have a receipt number exactly 80 and were received on or before 1973-11-05 21:48:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.receipt_date <= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND documents.receipt_number = '80'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents where documents.receipt_number = '80' and documents.receipt_date <= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter documents by exact receipt number 80 and receipt date on or before the specified datetime, then select document IDs with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which documents with receipt number 61 and other details exactly w, received on or after 1982-09-27 14:52:15, are currently working on and handled by the shipping agent named Ship with description t, whose drafts have details exactly m?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Ship' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 't' AND documents.receipt_number = '61' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'm' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1982-09-27 14:52:15' AND documents.other_details = 'w'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_shipping_agents on documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code join document_drafts on documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id where documents.receipt_number = '61' and lower(documents.other_details) = 'w' and documents.receipt_date >= '1982-09-27 14:52:15' and lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name) like '%ship%' and lower(ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description) like '%t%' and lower(document_drafts.draft_details) = 'm' limit 5
records.thought: Filter documents by receipt number, other details, receipt date, shipping agent name and description, and join with document drafts to filter by draft details exactly 'm'.
